title: pavonia pirottae
intro: Pavonia pirottae is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pavonia pirottae include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, including tinctures and ointments, to leverage its medicinal properties.
